mapper.select: SELECT venue_id AS venueId, venue_name AS venueName FROM VENUE ORDER BY venue_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PERFORMANCES (p_title, venue_id, poster_url) VALUES (#{pTitle}, #{venueId}, #{posterUrl})
INSERT INTO PERFORMANCE_ROUND (performance_id, round_time, open_time, round_status) VALUES (#{performanceId}, #{roundTime}, #{openTime}, 'OPEN')

INSERT INTO RESERVATIONS (user_id, seat_id, round_id, performance_id, reserved_status) SELECT NULL, s.seat_id, #{roundId}, #{performanceId}, 'AVAILABLE' FROM SEATS s JOIN PERFORMANCES p ON s.venue_id = p.venue_id WHERE p.performance_id = #{performanceId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.performance_id, A.p_title, V.venue_name, A.poster_url, A.created_per, B.round_id, B.round_time, B.open_time, B.round_status FROM PERFORMANCES A LEFT OUTER JOIN VENUE V ON A.venue_id = V.venue_id LEFT OUTER JOIN PERFORMANCE_ROUND B ON A.performance_id = B.performance_id ORDER BY A.created_per DESC
